meta.title: Veo 3.1 AI Video Generator | Multi-Reference & First-Last Frame | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning videos with Google's Veo 3.1. Features multi-reference mode for subject consistency, first-last frame control, and native audio. Up to 8s at 1080p. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Google's latest video generation model with enhanced creative controls. Veo 3.1 introduces multi-reference mode for subject consistency, first-last frame transitions, and improved native audio - all in stunning 1080p quality.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Veo 3.1 the next evolution in AI video generation

multiReference.title: Multi-Reference Mode
multiReference.description: Use up to 3 reference images to guide your scene composition. Maintain character and subject consistency across all frames for perfect continuity.

firstLastFrame.title: First & Last Frame Control
firstLastFrame.description: Provide start and end frames to generate smooth, coherent transitions. Perfect for controlled motion and precise storytelling.

audio.title: Enhanced Native Audio
audio.description: Richer audio generation with natural conversations, synchronized sound effects, and realistic lip-syncing for speaking characters.

sceneExtension.title: Scene Extension
sceneExtension.description: Create longer videos by extending clips while maintaining visual and audio continuity. Build stories that last a minute or more.

quality.title: Superior Visual Quality
quality.description: Enhanced realism with better prompt adherence, improved physics simulation, and cinematic visual quality at 1080p resolution.

narrative.title: Narrative Control
narrative.description: Improved understanding of cinematic styles and storytelling. Create videos that follow your creative vision precisely.

0.question: What is Veo 3.1 and what's new?
0.answer: Veo 3.1 is Google DeepMind's latest video generation model, building on Veo 3. It introduces multi-reference mode for subject consistency, first-last frame control for precise motion, enhanced audio with dialogue support, and scene extension for longer videos.

1.question: What is Multi-Reference Mode?
1.answer: Multi-Reference Mode allows you to upload 1-3 reference images of a character, object, or scene. The AI maintains the subject's identity and appearance across all frames, ensuring perfect continuity throughout your video.

2.question: How does First-Last Frame work?
2.answer: First-Last Frame mode lets you provide a starting and ending image. Veo 3.1 generates a smooth, natural transition between them with accompanying audio. This is ideal for controlled motion and precise storytelling.

3.question: What's the difference between Veo 3.1 and Veo 3.1 Fast?
3.answer: Veo 3.1 (Standard) uses Reference-to-Video for maximum quality and subject consistency, ideal for complex scenes. Veo 3.1 Fast uses Start & End Frame for controlled motion with faster generation time.

4.question: What video durations and resolutions are supported?
4.answer: Veo 3.1 generates videos at 720p or 1080p resolution, 24 FPS, with durations of 4, 6, or 8 seconds. You can use scene extension to create longer videos by connecting multiple clips.

5.question: Does Veo 3.1 support dialogue and lip-sync?
5.answer: Yes! The Standard model supports speaking characters with realistic facial expressions and lip-syncing, making it perfect for storytelling, marketing content, or any video featuring dialogue.
